title: stylidium neglectum
intro: Stylidium neglectum, also known as the Fiddlehead Stylidium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Stylidium neglectum include its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. It is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
